case_title: DHL AIRWAYS INC VS QUINT MATTHEW

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21908, RECORD TRANSFERRED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $497.02 FILED BY DHL AIRWAYS INC AS TO DEFENDANT QUINT MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
